entries.name: Dwarf
entries.notes: Taglia Medium, velocità 6 m (non ridotta da armatura/carico). +2 Costituzione, +2 Saggezza, -2 Carisma. Darkvision 18 m. Defensive Training: +4 dodge bonus alla CA contro creature di taglia Large o superiore. Greed: +2 a Appraise su oggetti di pietra/metallo. Hatred: +1 attacco contro orc e goblinoidi. Hardy: +2 a TS contro veleni, incantesimi e SLAs. Slow and Steady: velocità base 6 m non ridotta da armatura o carico pesante. Stability: +4 bonus a CMD contro bull rush e trip se sta in piedi a terra. Stonecunning: +2 a Perception per individuare pietra lavorata insolita; cerca come a riposo. Weapon Familiarity: dwarven urgrosch e waraxe trattate come armi marziali. Lingue: Common, Dwarven; bonus: Giant, Gnome, Goblin, Orc, Terran, Undercommon.
entries.description: Dwarf: modificatori {'con': 2, 'wis': 2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 20 ft. Tratti razziali: Darkvision; Defensive Training; Greed; Hatred; Hardy; Stability; Stonecunning; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Dwarves can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Defensive Training
traits.text: Dwarves get a +4 dodge bonus to their AC against monsters of the giant subtype.

traits.name: Greed
traits.text: Dwarves receive a +2 racial bonus on Appraise checks made to determine the price of nonmagical goods that contain precious metals or gemstones.

traits.name: Hatred
traits.text: Dwarves receive a +1 bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the orc and goblinoid subtypes because of their special training against these hated foes.

traits.name: Hardy
traits.text: Dwarves receive a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against poison, spells, and spell-like abilities.

traits.name: Stability
traits.text: Dwarves receive a +4 racial bonus to their Combat Maneuver Defense when resisting a bull rush or trip attempt while standing on the ground.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.text: Dwarves receive a +2 bonus on Perception checks to potentially notice unusual stonework, such as traps and hidden doors located in stone walls or floors. They receive a check to notice any such features that they pass within 10 feet of, whether or not they are actively looking.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Dwarves are prof icient with battleaxes, heavy picks, and warhammers, and treat any weapon with the word “dwarven” in its name as a martial weapon.

entries.name: Elf
entries.notes: Taglia Medium, velocità 9 m. +2 Destrezza, +2 Intelligenza, -2 Costituzione. Low-light vision. Elven Immunities: immunità a sleep magic e +2 a TS enchantment. Keen Senses: +2 a Perception. Elven Magic: +2 a Spellcraft per identificare proprietà magiche; +1 al CL per superare SR. Weapon Familiarity: longbows, composite longbows, longswords, rapiers, shortbows, composite shortbows trattate come armi marziali. Lingue: Common, Elven; bonus: Celestial, Draconic, Gnoll, Gnome, Goblin, Orc, Sylvan.
entries.description: Elf: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'int': 2, 'con': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Low-Light Vision; Elven Immunities; Elven Magic; Keen Senses; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Elves can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Elven Immunities
traits.text: Elves are immune to magic sleep effects and get a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against enchantment spells and effects.

traits.name: Elven Magic
traits.text: Elves receive a +2 racial bonus on caster level checks made to overcome spell resistance. In addition, elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Spellcraft checks made to identify the properties of magic items.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: Elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception checks.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Elves are proficient with longbows (including composite longbows), longswords, rapiers, and shortbows (including composite shortbows), and treat any weapon with the word “elven” in its name as a martial weapon.

entries.name: Gnome
entries.notes: Taglia Small (+1 CA, +1 attacco, -1 CMB/CMD, +4 Stealth), velocità 6 m. +2 Costituzione, +2 Carisma, -2 Forza. Low-light vision. Defensive Training: +4 dodge bonus alla CA contro creature di tipo giant. Gnome Magic: +1 al DC degli incantesimi di illusione; 1/giorno dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation (CL pari al livello del personaggio). Hatred: +1 attacco contro creature di tipo reptilian e goblinoid. Illusion Resistance: +2 a TS contro illusion school. Keen Senses: +2 a Perception. Obsessive: +2 a un'abilità craft o profession scelta. Weapon Familiarity: gnome hooked hammer trattata come arma marziale. Lingue: Common, Gnome, Sylvan; bonus: Draconic, Dwarven, Elven, Giant, Goblin, Orc.
entries.description: Gnome: modificatori {'con': 2, 'cha': 2, 'str': -2}, taglia Small, velocita' 20 ft. Tratti razziali: Low-Light Vision; Defensive Training; Gnome Magic; Hatred; Illusion Resistance; Keen Senses; Obsessive; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Gnomes can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Defensive Training
traits.text: Gnomes get a +4 dodge bonus to their AC against monsters of the giant type.

traits.name: Gnome Magic
traits.text: Gnomes add 1 to the DCs of any saving throws to resist illusion spells that they cast. Gnomes with a Charisma of 11 or higher also gain the following spell-like abilities: 1/day—dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation, and speak with animals. The caster level for these effects is equal to the gnome’s character level. The DC for these spells is equal to 10 + the spell’s level + the gnome’s Charisma modifier.

traits.name: Hatred
traits.text: Gnomes receive a +1 bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the reptilian and goblinoid subtypes because of their special training against these hated foes.

traits.name: Illusion Resistance
traits.text: Gnomes get a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against illusion spells or effects.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: Gnomes receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception checks.

traits.name: Obsessive
traits.text: Gnomes receive a +2 racial bonus on a Craft or Profession skill of their choice.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Gnomes treat any weapon with the word “gnome” in its name as a martial weapon.

entries.name: Half-Elf
entries.notes: Taglia Medium, velocità 9 m. +2 a una statistica a scelta. Low-light vision. Adaptability: riceve Skill Focus come bonus feat al 1° livello. Elf Blood: conta come elfo e umano per effetti legati alla razza. Elven Immunities: immunità a sleep magic e +2 a TS enchantment. Keen Senses: +2 a Perception. Multitalented: possiede due favored class. Lingue: Common, Elven; bonus: qualsiasi (tranne linguaggi segreti).
entries.description: Half-Elf: modificatori {'any': 2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Low-Light Vision; Adaptability; Elf Blood; Elven Immunities; Keen Senses; Multitalented.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Half-elves can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Adaptability
traits.text: Half-elves receive Skill Focus as a bonus feat at 1st level.

traits.name: Elf Blood
traits.text: Half-elves count as both elves and humans for any effect related to race.

traits.name: Elven Immunities
traits.text: Half-elves are immune to magic sleep effects and get a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against enchantment spells and effects.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: Half-elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception checks.

traits.name: Multitalented
traits.text: Half-elves choose two favored classes at 1st level and gain 1 additional hit point or skill point whenever they take a level in either one of those classes.

entries.name: Half-Orc
entries.notes: Taglia Medium, velocità 9 m. +2 a una statistica a scelta. Darkvision 18 m. Intimidating: +2 a Intimidate. Orc Blood: conta come orco e umano per effetti legati alla razza. Orc Ferocity: 1/giorno, quando portato a 0 PF o inferiore, può agire per un round come se avesse 1 PF. Weapon Familiarity: orc double axe e falchion trattate come armi marziali; greataxe come arma semplice. Lingue: Common, Orc; bonus: Abyssal, Draconic, Giant, Gnoll, Goblin.
entries.description: Half-Orc: modificatori {'any': 2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Darkvision; Intimidating; Orc Blood; Orc Ferocity; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Half-orcs can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Intimidating
traits.text: Half-orcs receive a +2 racial bonus on Intimidate checks because of their fearsome nature.

traits.name: Orc Blood
traits.text: Half-orcs count as both humans and orcs for any effect related to race.

traits.name: Orc Ferocity
traits.text: Once per day, when a half-orc is brought below 0 hit points but not killed, he can fight on for 1 more round as if disabled. At the end of his next turn, unless brought to 1 or more hit points, he immediately falls unconscious and begins dying.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Half-orcs are proficient with greataxes and falchions, and treat any weapon with the word “orc” in its name as a martial weapon.

entries.name: Halfling
entries.notes: Taglia Small (+1 CA, +1 attacco, -1 CMB/CMD, +4 Stealth), velocità 6 m. +2 Destrezza, +2 Carisma, -2 Forza. Fearless: +2 morale a TS contro paura. Halfling Luck: +1 a tutti i TS. Keen Senses: +2 a Perception. Sure-Footed: +2 a Acrobatics e Climb. Weapon Familiarity: sling e halfling sling staff trattate come armi da guerra. Lingue: Common, Halfling; bonus: Dwarven, Elven, Gnome, Goblin.
entries.description: Halfling: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': 2, 'str': -2}, taglia Small, velocita' 20 ft. Tratti razziali: Fearless; Halfling Luck; Keen Senses; Sure-Footed; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Fearless
traits.text: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on all saving throws against fear. This bonus stacks with the bonus granted by halfling luck.

traits.name: Halfling Luck
traits.text: Halflings receive a +1 racial bonus on all saving throws.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception checks.

traits.name: Sure-Footed
traits.text: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on Acrobatics and Climb checks.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Halflings are proficient with slings and treat any weapon with the word “halfling” in its name as a martial weapon.

entries.name: Human
entries.notes: Taglia Medium, velocità 9 m. +2 a una statistica a scelta. Bonus Feat: un extra feat al 1° livello. Skilled: +1 punto abilità extra per livello. Lingue: Common; bonus: qualsiasi (tranne linguaggi segreti). Favored Class: bonus extra +1 HP o +1 punto abilità per livello nella favored class.
entries.description: Human: modificatori {'any': 2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Bonus Feat; Skilled.

traits.name: Bonus Feat
traits.text: Humans select one extra feat at 1st level.

traits.name: Skilled
traits.text: Humans gain 1 additional skill rank at 1st level and 1 additional rank whenever they gain a level.

entries.name: Catfolk
entries.description: Catfolk: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': 2, 'wis': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Catfolk; Low-Light Vision; Cat’s Luck; Natural Hunter; Sprinter.

traits.name: Catfolk
traits.text: Catfolk are humanoids with the catfolk subtype.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: In dim light, catfolk can see twice as far as humans.

traits.name: Cat’s Luck
traits.text: Once per day when a catfolk attempts a Reflex saving throw, he can roll the saving throw twice and take the better result. He must decide to use this ability before the saving throw is attempted.

traits.name: Natural Hunter
traits.text: Catfolk receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception, Stealth, and Survival checks.

traits.name: Sprinter
traits.text: Catfolk gain a 10-foot racial bonus to their speed when using the charge, run, or withdraw actions.

entries.name: Fetchling
entries.description: Fetchling: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': 2, 'wis': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Darkvision; Low-Light Vision; Skilled; Shadow Blending; Shadowy Resistance; Spell-Like Abilities.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Fetchlings are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Fetchlings can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Fetchlings can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Skilled
traits.text: Fetchlings have a +2 racial bonus on Knowledge (planes) and Stealth checks.

traits.name: Shadow Blending
traits.text: Attacks against a fetchling in dim light have a 50% miss chance instead of the normal 20% miss chance. This ability does not grant total concealment; it just increases the miss chance.

traits.name: Shadowy Resistance
traits.text: Fetchlings have cold resistance 5 and electricity resistance 5.

traits.name: Spell-Like Abilities
traits.text: A fetchling can use disguise self once per day as a spell-like ability. He can assume the form of any humanoid creature using this spell-like ability. When a fetchling reaches character 9th level in any combination of classes, he gains shadow walk (self only) as a spell-like ability usable once per day, and at 13th level, he gains plane shift (self only, to the Shadow Plane or the Material Plane only) usable once per day. A fetchling’s caster level for these abilities is equal to his character level.

entries.name: Goblin
entries.description: Goblin: modificatori {'dex': 4, 'str': -2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Small, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Goblinoid; Darkvision; Skilled.

traits.name: Goblinoid
traits.text: Goblins are humanoids with the goblinoid subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Goblins can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Skilled
traits.text: +4 racial bonus on Ride and Stealth checks.

entries.name: Grippli
entries.description: Grippli: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'wis': 2, 'str': -2}, taglia Small, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Grippli; Natural Climber; Darkvision; Camouflage; Swamp Stride; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Grippli
traits.text: Gripplis are humanoids with the grippli subtype.

traits.name: Natural Climber
traits.text: Gripplis have a climb speed of 20 feet.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Gripplis can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Camouflage
traits.text: Gripplis receive a +4 racial bonus on Stealth checks in marshes and forested areas.

traits.name: Swamp Stride
traits.text: A grippli can move through difficult terrain at its normal speed while within a swamp. Magically altered terrain affects a grippli normally.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Gripplis are proficient with nets.

entries.name: Kasatha
entries.description: Kasatha: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'wis': 2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Kasatha; Defensive Training; Desert Runner; Desert Stride; Jumper; Multi-Armed; Stalker.

traits.name: Kasatha
traits.text: Kasathas are humanoids with the kasatha subtype.

traits.name: Defensive Training
traits.text: Kasathas have a +2 dodge bonus to Armor Class.

traits.name: Desert Runner
traits.text: A kasatha has a +4 racial bonus on Constitution checks and Fortitude saves to avoid fatigue, exhaustion, and other ill effects from running, forced marches, starvation, thirst, and hot or cold environments.

traits.name: Desert Stride
traits.text: A kasatha moves through nonmagical difficult terrain in desert environments at normal speed.

traits.name: Jumper
traits.text: A kasatha is always considered to have a running start when attempting Acrobatics checks to jump.

traits.name: Multi-Armed
traits.text: A kasatha has four arms. One hand is considered its primary hand; all others are considered off hands. It can use any of its hands for other purposes that require free hands.

traits.name: Stalker
traits.text: Perception and Stealth are class skills for kasathas.

entries.name: Kitsune
entries.description: Kitsune: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': 2, 'str': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Kitsune; Low-Light Vision; Change Shape; Agile; Kitsune Magic; Natural Weapons.

traits.name: Kitsune
traits.text: Kitsune are humanoids with the kitsune and shapechanger subtypes.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Kitsune can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Change Shape
traits.text: A kitsune can assume the appearance of a specific single human form of the same sex. The kitsune always takes this specific form when she uses this ability. A kitsune in human form cannot use her bite attack, but gains a +10 racial bonus on Disguise checks made to appear human. Changing shape is a standard action. This ability otherwise functions as alter self, except that the kitsune does not adjust her ability scores and can remain in this form indefinitely.

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: Kitsune receive a +2 racial bonus on Acrobatics checks.

traits.name: Kitsune Magic
traits.text: Kitsune add 1 to the DCs of any saving throws to resist enchantment spells that they cast. Kitsune with a Charisma score of 11 or higher gain the following spell-like ability: 3/day—dancing lights (caster level equals the kitsune’s level).

traits.name: Natural Weapons
traits.text: In her natural form, a kitsune has a bite attack that deals 1d4 points of damage.

entries.name: Oread
entries.description: Oread: modificatori {'str': 2, 'wis': 2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 20 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Darkvision; Spell-Like Ability; Energy Resistance; Earth Affinity.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Oreads are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Oreads can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Spell-Like Ability
traits.text: Oreads can use magic stone 1/day as spell-like ability (with a caster level equal to the oread’s character level; DC 11 + Charisma modifier).

traits.name: Energy Resistance
traits.text: Oreads have acid resistance 5.

traits.name: Earth Affinity
traits.text: Oread sorcerers with the elemental (earth) bloodline treat their Charisma scores as 2 points higher for the purposes of all sorcerer spells and class abilities. Oread clerics with the Earth domain use their domain powers and spells at +1 caster level.

entries.name: Samsaran
entries.description: Samsaran: modificatori {'int': 2, 'wis': 2, 'con': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Samsaran; Low-Light Vision; Lifebound; Samsaran Magic; Shards of the Past.

traits.name: Samsaran
traits.text: Samsarans are humanoids with the samsaran subtype.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Samsarans can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Lifebound
traits.text: Samsarans gain a +2 racial bonus on all saving throws to resist death effects, saving throws against negative energy effects, Fortitude saves to remove negative levels, and Constitution checks to stabilize if reduced to negative hit points.

traits.name: Samsaran Magic
traits.text: Samsarans with a Charisma score of 11 or higher gain the following spell-like abilities: 1/day— comprehend languages, deathwatch, and stabilize. The caster level for these effects equals the samsaran’s character level.

traits.name: Shards of the Past
traits.text: A samsaran’s past lives grant her bonuses on two skills. The samsaran chooses two skills—she gains a +2 racial bonus on both, and they are always class skills for her. Once made, this choice can’t be altered.

entries.name: Shabti
entries.description: Shabti: modificatori {'con': 2, 'cha': 2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Darkvision; Immortal (Ex); Immune to Undeath (Ex); Past Life Knowledge (Ex); Resist Level Drain (Ex); Shattered Soul (Ex); Spell-Like Ability.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Shabti are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Shabti can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Immortal (Ex)
traits.text: Shabti do not age naturally and can’t die of old age. While some might come into being at age categories other than adulthood, they never leave their original age categories. Spells and effects that cause aging affect a shabti as normal.

traits.name: Immune to Undeath (Ex)
traits.text: Shabti can’t become undead. Spells and abilities that would transform a shabti into an undead creature have no effect.

traits.name: Past Life Knowledge (Ex)
traits.text: Shabti remember bits of their past lives. As a result, they treat all Knowledge skills as class skills.

traits.name: Resist Level Drain (Ex)
traits.text: A shabti takes no penalties from energy drain effects, though it can still be killed if it accrues more negative levels than it has Hit Dice. After 24 hours, any negative levels a shabti takes are automatically removed without the need for additional saving throws.

traits.name: Shattered Soul (Ex)
traits.text: Shabti who are killed are exceptionally difficult to return to life. Anyone who attempts to return a shabti to life using raise dead, resurrection, or a similar spell must succeed at a caster level check whose DC is equal to 10 + the shabti’s Hit Dice. If it fails, the spell fails and the caster can’t return the shabti to life for the next 24 hours (though the caster can try again after this period).

traits.name: Spell-Like Ability
traits.text: A shabti can use suggestion once per day as a spell-like ability, with a caster level equal to the shabti’s class level.

entries.name: Strix
entries.description: Strix: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Low-Light Vision; Darkvision; Hatred; Nocturnal; Suspicious.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Strix can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Strix can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Hatred
traits.text: Strix receive a +1 bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the human subtype because of their special training against these hated foes.

traits.name: Nocturnal
traits.text: Strix gain a +2 racial bonus on Perception and Stealth checks in dim light or darkness.

traits.name: Suspicious
traits.text: Strix receive a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against illusion spells or effects.

entries.name: Suli
entries.description: Suli: modificatori {'str': 2, 'cha': 2, 'int': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Low-Light Vision; Negotiator; Elemental Assault; Energy Resistance.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Sulis are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Sulis can see twice as far as humans in dim light.

traits.name: Negotiator
traits.text: Sulis are keen negotiators, and gain a +2 racial bonus on Diplomacy and Sense Motive checks.

traits.name: Elemental Assault
traits.text: Once per day as a swift action, a suli can shroud her arms in acid, cold, electricity, or fire. This effect lasts for 1 round per level and can be dismissed as a free action. Unarmed strikes with her arms or hands (or attacks with weapons held in those hands) deal +1d6 points of damage of the appropriate energy type.

traits.name: Energy Resistance
traits.text: Sulis have resistance to acid 5, cold 5, electricity 5, and fire 5.

auto: one elemental language (Aquan, Auran, Ignan, or Terran)

entries.name: Sylph
entries.description: Sylph: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'int': 2, 'con': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Darkvision; Spell-Like Ability; Energy Resistance; Air Affinity.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Sylphs are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Sylphs can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Spell-Like Ability
traits.text: Sylphs can use feather fall 1/day as a spell-like ability (with a caster level equal to the sylph’s character level).

traits.name: Energy Resistance
traits.text: Sylphs have electricity resistance 5.

traits.name: Air Affinity
traits.text: Sylph sorcerers with the elemental (air) bloodline treat their Charisma scores as 2 points higher for the purposes of all sorcerer spells and class abilities. Sylph spellcasters with the Air domain use their domain powers and spells at +1 caster level.

entries.name: Tengu
entries.description: Tengu: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'wis': 2, 'con': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Tengu; Senses; Sneaky; Gifted Linguist; Swordtrained; Natural Weapon.

traits.name: Tengu
traits.text: Tengus are humanoids with the tengu subtype.

traits.name: Senses
traits.text: Tengus have low-light vision.

traits.name: Sneaky
traits.text: Tengus gain a +2 racial bonus on Perception and Stealth checks.

traits.name: Gifted Linguist
traits.text: Tengus gain a +4 racial bonus on Linguistics checks, and learn two languages each time they gain a rank in Linguistics rather than one language.

traits.name: Swordtrained
traits.text: Tengus are automatically proficient with swordlike weapons (including bastard swords, daggers, elven curve blades, falchions, greatswords, kukris, longswords, punching daggers, rapiers, scimitars, short swords, and two-bladed swords).

traits.name: Natural Weapon
traits.text: A tengu has a bite attack that deals 1d3 points of damage.

entries.name: Tiefling
entries.description: Tiefling: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'int': 2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Native Outsider; Darkvision; Skilled; Spell-Like Ability; Fiendish Resistance; Fiendish Sorcery.

traits.name: Native Outsider
traits.text: Tieflings are outsiders with the native subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Tieflings see in the dark for up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Skilled
traits.text: Tieflings gain a +2 racial bonus on Bluff and Stealth checks. Tieflings of specific bloodlines (see below) gain a +2 bonus on different skill checks as indicated.

traits.name: Spell-Like Ability
traits.text: Tieflings can use darkness once per day as a spell-like ability (with a caster level equal to the tiefling’s character level). Tieflings of specific bloodlines (see below) gain different spell-like abilities.

traits.name: Fiendish Resistance
traits.text: Tieflings have cold resistance 5, electricity resistance 5, and fire resistance 5.

traits.name: Fiendish Sorcery
traits.text: Tiefling sorcerers with the Abyssal or Infernal bloodlines treat their Charisma scores as 2 points higher for the purposes of all sorcerer class abilities.

entries.name: Vanara
entries.description: Vanara: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'wis': 2, 'cha': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Vanara; Low-Light Vision; Nimble; Prehensile Tail.

traits.name: Vanara
traits.text: Vanaras are humanoids with the vanara subtype.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: A vanara can see twice as far as a human in dim light.

traits.name: Nimble
traits.text: Vanaras have a +2 racial bonus on Acrobatics and Stealth checks.

traits.name: Prehensile Tail
traits.text: A vanara has a long, flexible tail that she can use to carry objects. She cannot wield weapons with her tail, but the tail allows her to retrieve a small, stowed object carried on her person as a swift action.

entries.name: Vishkanya
entries.description: Vishkanya: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'cha': 2, 'wis': -2}, taglia Medium, velocita' 30 ft. Tratti razziali: Vishkanya; Low-Light Vision; Keen Senses; Limber; Poison Resistance; Poison Use; Toxic; Weapon Familiarity.

traits.name: Vishkanya
traits.text: Vishkanyas are humanoids with the vishkanya subtype.

traits.name: Low-Light Vision
traits.text: Vishkanyas can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: Vishkanyas receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception checks.

traits.name: Limber
traits.text: Vishkanyas receive a +2 racial bonus on Escape Artist and Stealth checks.

traits.name: Poison Resistance
traits.text: A vishkanya has a racial bonus on saving throws against poison equal to its Hit Dice.

traits.name: Poison Use
traits.text: Vishkanyas are skilled in the use of poison and never accidentally poison themselves when using or applying poison.

traits.name: Toxic
traits.text: A number of times per day equal to his Constitution modifier (minimum 1/day), a vishkanya can envenom a weapon that he wields with his toxic saliva or blood (using blood requires the vishkanya to be injured when he uses this ability). Applying venom in this way is a swift action.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.text: Vishkanyas are always proficient with blowguns, kukri, and shuriken.

entries.name: Wayang
entries.description: Wayang: modificatori {'dex': 2, 'int': 2, 'wis': -2}, taglia Small, velocita' 20 ft. Tratti razziali: Wayang; Darkvision; Light and Dark; Lurker; Shadow Magic; Shadow Resistance.

traits.name: Wayang
traits.text: Wayangs are humanoids with the wayang subtype.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.text: Wayangs can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

traits.name: Light and Dark
traits.text: Once per day as an immediate action, a wayang can treat positive and negative energy effects as if she were an undead creature, taking damage from positive energy and being healed of damage by negative energy. This ability lasts for 1 minute once activated.

traits.name: Lurker
traits.text: Wayangs gain a +2 racial bonus on Perception and Stealth checks.

traits.name: Shadow Magic
traits.text: Wayangs add 1 to the DC of any saving throws to resist spells of the shadow subschool that they cast. Wayangs with a Charisma score of 11 or higher also gain the following spell-like abilities: 1/day—ghost sound, pass without trace, and ventriloquism. The caster level for these effects is equal to the wayang’s character level. The DCs of these spells are equal to 10 + the spell’s level + the wayang’s Charisma modifier.

traits.name: Shadow Resistance
traits.text: Wayangs get a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against spells of the shadow subschool.
